title: pearcea glabrata
intro: Pearcea glabrata, also known as the Colombian Gold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pearcea glabrata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Pearcea glabrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
